The 11 named tests and the AC4 anchor (TestApproveImplCallOrder) thus retain identical discriminating power; every round-1 RED-on-revert conclusion still holds. go test -count=1 ./internal/approve -run 'TestApproveImpl_NoCommitsNoBeads|TestApproveImplCallOrder' -v is green. R7's citation is truthful: grep confirms MergeBase at impl.go:294; :249 retained as the pre-115 Fact-1 pin. The rewritten doc comment now correctly states Leg 3 subsumes the degenerate-plan preflight. Code .go tree clean (only review artifacts modified).
